message:
test(arena): refresh bd-15n.2 fixture results with socket fixture

Re-run bd-15n.2 CVE arena fixtures after ctype/math symbol additions.
Results:
  - fixture_ctype: now PASS in both strict and hardened (was exit 124)
  - fixture_math: now PASS in both modes (stdout captured)
  - fixture_socket: added, FAIL in both modes (exit 1) — expected,
    socket interposition not yet wired

Adds hardened-mode result artifacts (exit_code, stdout, stderr) for all
three fixtures, artifact_index.json, and report.json. Updates trace.jsonl
with the full 13-entry run log (6 test pairs + 1 summary).

Summary: 4/6 fixture tests pass, 2/6 fail (socket).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
